arts.ttl: Exclusive: Nike Mercurial 2026 Mbappe Signature Boots Info Leaked
arts.sum: Footy Headlines can leak early information about Mbappe's signature shoes that will be released by Nike in the first half of 2026.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe beats Brazilian Ronaldo's Real Madrid record with quickfire brace in 2-1 win over Villarreal - as he recreates Cristiano Ronaldo's iconic celebration
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe smashed a goalscoring record of Real Madrid icon Ronaldo Nazario with a vital quickfire brace against Villarreal - and marked it by recreating Cristiano Ronaldo's celebration.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Villarreal 1 - 2 Real Madrid, La Liga 2024 - 2025
arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Matt Wiltse gives his analysis of Real Madrid’s win over Villarreal at the Ceramica — a notoriously difficult place to play for Carlo Ancelotti’s men. Managing Madrid is a hub for all Madridistas with updated news, op-eds, tactical analyses, artwork, and of course, podcasts.

arts.ttl: On-loan Atlético star: ‘I would quit football before signing for Real Madrid’
arts.sum: An on-loan member of the attacking ranks at La Liga giants Atlético Madrid has this weekend ruled out a potential future move to Real Madrid in the most definitive manner…

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti: Real Madrid will refuse to play with less than 72 hours rest
arts.sum: The Italian is angry after Saturday’s 2-1 victory at Villarreal took place 66 hours after Real set up a Champions League quarter-final with Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres: Sporting make transfer admission after Real Madrid decision
arts.sum: Sporting CP head coach Rui Borges has confessed that the club is already preparing for life after Viktor Gyokeres . Viktor Gyokeres: Sporting make transfer admission after Real Madrid decision

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappé vs Robert Lewandowski: Pichichi race latest after Real Madrid star’s brace vs Villarreal
arts.sum: The race for the top-scorer prize in Spain’s top-flight has on Saturday evening become an altogether more closely-contested one. This comes owing to developments in Real Madrid’s meeting with Villarreal.…

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “We asked LaLiga to change the schedule twice, and nothing happened”
arts.sum: Ancelotti was asked about the schedule, and how little time they have had to rest and prepare for the match. Ancelotti on how proud he is of the team

arts.ttl: “This is the last time” – Carlo Ancelotti threatens La Liga over Real Madrid rest issue
arts.sum: Real Madrid secured a very important victory on Saturday as they came from behind to defeat Villarreal 2-1 at La Ceramica. It is a result that sends them top of La Liga for the time being, although they can be overtaken by one of Barcelona or Atletico Madrid, who face off against each other on […] The post “This is the last time” – Carlo Ancelotti threatens La Liga over Real Madrid rest issue appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Photo: 4 Real Madrid stars drop to turf in exhaustion after win over Villarreal
arts.sum: Several leading members of the first-team ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid could not help but show their exhaustion, on the back of the club’s latest outing. Real Madrid…
